title: Garlicky Filipino Bun Stir-fry
description: A crispy and garlicky Filipino dish featuring crispy bun pieces in a flavorful sauce that's perfect for a light midday meal.

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon
ingredients.amount: peanut or sesame seeds (optional, for garnish)

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant but not browned.
Place the buns on the wok and sprinkle with fish sauce and soy sauce.
Stir everything together to coat the buns evenly.
Once heated, let the bun pieces crisp up and slightly char in oil for about 1-2 minutes.
Remove from heat and garnish with sesame or peanut seeds if desired.
Serve immediately as a side dish or main course.
